videos.title: OAuth 2.0 explained with examples
videos.description: Welcome to the ultimate guide on OAuth 2.0! In this 10-minute video, we'll unravel the complexities of OAuth 2.0, exploring its fundamental workings, identity providers, access tokens, the four types of OAuth flows, and its integration with JWT. Whether you're a seasoned developer or new to the world of digital security, this video will equip you with the knowledge you need.

videos.title: What is SAML? A Comprehensive Guide with Examples
videos.description: Welcome to the comprehensive guide on SAML! In this 10-minute video, we'll unravel the complexities of SAML, exploring its fundamental workings, service providers, identity providers, , its use cases, and comparing it with OAuth.. Whether you're a seasoned developer or new to the world of digital security, this video will equip you with the knowledge you need.
